740 GG0170N3_4_STP_END_CD GG0170N3_4_STP_END_CD GG0170N3 4 Step End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching
